title: LocalResourceHealth
description: Schema for local resource health state consumed by the launch gate and WebUI. Captures CPU, memory, disk, process count, and worker concurrency metrics for a single machine. Written by the provider-pool guard or local ops doctor. See docs/ai-native/local-resource-health-schema.md for field-level documentation.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Increment when the schema shape changes.

hostname.description: Machine hostname this snapshot was captured on.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this resource health snapshot was captured.

overall.description: Aggregated resource health status. Derived from the worst individual resource status.

disk.description: Disk utilization metrics for the primary working volume.

concurrency.description: Worker concurrency metrics for the launch gate.

warnings.description: Human-readable warning messages for resources in degraded or critical state.

ResourceStatus.description: Health status for a resource dimension. ok = healthy, degraded = elevated but functional, critical = at or above hard limit.

status.description: CPU health status derived from usage thresholds.

usagePercent.description: Current CPU usage as a percentage (0-100).

cores.description: Number of logical CPU cores available.

loadAverage1m.description: 1-minute load average, if available on this platform.

status.description: Memory health status derived from usage thresholds.

usagePercent.description: Current memory usage as a percentage (0-100).

status.description: Disk health status derived from usage thresholds.

usagePercent.description: Current disk usage as a percentage (0-100).

path.description: Filesystem path this disk measurement applies to (e.g. '/' or 'C:\').

total.description: Total number of running processes on the system.

nodeProcessCount.description: Number of Node.js processes currently running.

status.description: Concurrency health status. critical when activeWorkers >= maxWorkers.

activeWorkers.description: Number of currently active worker tasks.

queuedTasks.description: Number of tasks waiting in the dispatch queue.
